title: Flea Treatment in Midwood, Brooklyn | $350 – $650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Midwood, Brooklyn starting at $350. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Midwood home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Midwood, Brooklyn, with pricing ranging from $350 to $650 depending on the size and severity of the infestation. Our experienced technicians use safe, proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Midwood residents for years with tailored flea solutions that address the unique challenges of Brooklyn's diverse housing, from pre-war apartment buildings to single-family homes. Our licensed exterminators respond quickly, often offering same-day service, and we back our work with a satisfaction guarantee to ensure your home remains flea-free.
localContext: Midwood's tree-lined streets, proximity to parks like Marine Park and the Botanical Gardens, and the prevalence of pet-friendly households make flea prevention especially important in this neighborhood. Whether you live in one of the charming brick homes near Avenue M or in a multi-family building along Ocean Avenue, our team understands the specific pest pressures facing Midwood properties.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Midwood typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, the extent of the infestation, and whether multiple rooms or floors require treatment. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show significant results within 24-48 hours, with adult fleas dying quickly after application. However, because flea eggs and pupae can remain dormant, we typically recommend a follow-up treatment after 2-3 weeks to ensure complete elimination of the infestation across all life stages.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for both pets and children when applied correctly. We'll provide specific instructions on how long to keep pets and family members out of treated areas (typically 2-4 hours) and answer any safety concerns you may have about our treatment methods.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Midwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand that flea infestations require urgent attention, and we offer same-day service throughout Midwood whenever possible. Contact us early in the day for the best chance of same-day treatment, and our team will work to accommodate your schedule and eliminate your flea problem quickly.
